instructions.instruction: Self-review the actual full branch diff using the Review Order below.
instructions.original_snippets: Self-review the actual full branch diff using the Review Order below.

instructions.instruction: **Large diff (>50 files)**: Prioritize **Critical** checks first; sample key files for **Suggestion** items.
instructions.original_snippets: **Large diff (>50 files)**: Prioritize **Critical** checks first; sample key files for **Suggestion** items.

instructions.instruction: **`Critical`** — security, data loss, crash, or **Always Critical** (see below). Block merge.

instructions.instruction: `Repo` calls inside LiveViews — must delegate to context modules

instructions.instruction: [lib/my_app/accounts.ex:42] (Security) `String.to_atom(params["role"])` on user input causes atom table exhaustion. **Mitigation:** Use explicit case with whitelist instead.
instructions.original_snippets: [lib/my_app/accounts.ex:42] (Security) `String.to_atom(params["role"])` on user input causes atom table exhaustion. **Mitigation:** Use explicit case with whitelist instead.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger code-review.

instructions.instruction: **Re-review required:** Yes — Critical fixes must be re-diffed before approval.
instructions.original_snippets: **Re-review required:** Yes — Critical fixes must be re-diffed before approval.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger code-review.

instructions.instruction: Findings must come from an actual diff or provided file contents — do not present a simulated review as-if real.
instructions.original_snippets: Findings must come from an actual diff or provided file contents — do not present a simulated review as-if real.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger code-review.

instructions.instruction: Tagging: Tag (Area) from the Review Order table. Cover **≥4** distinct areas if applicable.
instructions.original_snippets: Tagging: Tag (Area) from the Review Order table. Cover **≥4** distinct areas if applicable.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger code-review.

instructions.instruction: Task-list: Always include a `Code review before merge` task or task-list line.
